package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsRetryLoopWithoutBackoff() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_network_calls_retry_loop_without_backoff"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Network calls. Flag network retry loops that immediately retry and amplify load."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
